creator: ab@samba.org
text:
I think this patch is wrong. It is more useful to fix actual code at FS 
level where mtime shouldn't be changed during xattr update. This is the 
way xattr is implemented in GNU/Linux and is what expected by applications.

More to that, stat/fstat calls aren't useful here, they costful and 
flush cache.

-- 
/ Alexander Bokovoy
